purpose: Config-as-code registry for data-layer LLM agents used during document analysis, classification, and extraction.

ollama_lan.label: Ollama LAN default analyst
ollama_lan.data_policy: Only send data allowed for the local LAN Ollama environment. Human review remains required before changing product data or certification state.

ollama_certification_expert.label: Environment-local certification expert
ollama_certification_expert.data_policy: Enable only in environments where this expert model is approved for certification-supporting analysis.

deepseek.label: DeepSeek existing enterprise alternative
deepseek.data_policy: Alternative enterprise configuration. Enable only if the environment already has an approved DeepSeek contract, API key handling, and data movement policy.

gemini.label: Gemini cloud fallback
gemini.data_policy: Use only if the environment is approved to send the document classification prompt to Gemini.

groq.label: Groq cloud fallback
groq.data_policy: Use only if the environment is approved to send the document classification prompt to Groq.

ollama_lan.description: Default LAN Ollama generate call for local document analysis.

body.prompt: Classify this product document and return JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products.

ollama_lan.example_curl: curl http://192.168.178.60:11434/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"gpt-oss:20b","prompt":"Classify this product document and return JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products.","stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0.1,"num_predict":4096}}'

ollama_certification_expert.description: Environment-local Ollama expert call for certification evidence review. Enable the provider before using this chain.

body.prompt: Review this product evidence for CE, RoHS, REACH, VDE, and UN 38.3 relevance. Return structured JSON with findings, missing_evidence, and human_review_required.

ollama_certification_expert.example_curl: curl http://192.168.178.60:11434/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"gpt-oss:20b","prompt":"Review this product evidence for CE, RoHS, REACH, VDE, and UN 38.3 relevance. Return structured JSON with findings, missing_evidence, and human_review_required.","stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0.05,"num_predict":4096}}'

messages.content: You classify product and certification documents. Return strict JSON only.
Classify this product document and return JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products.

deepseek.example_curl: curl https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${DEEPSEEK_API_KEY}" -d '{"model":"deepseek-chat","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You classify product and certification documents. Return strict JSON only."},{"role":"user","content":"Classify this product document and return JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products."}],"temperature":0.1,"max_tokens":4096}'

parts.text: Classify this product document and return strict JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products.

gemini.example_curl: curl "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.0-flash:generateContent?key=${GEMINI_API_KEY}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"contents":[{"parts":[{"text":"Classify this product document and return strict JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products."}]}],"generationConfig":{"temperature":0.1,"maxOutputTokens":4096}}'

messages.content: You classify product and certification documents. Return strict JSON only.
Classify this product document and return JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products.

groq.example_curl: curl https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GROQ_API_KEY}" -d '{"model":"llama-3.3-70b-versatile","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You classify product and certification documents. Return strict JSON only."},{"role":"user","content":"Classify this product document and return JSON with document_type, confidence, reasoning, multi_product, and detected_products."}],"temperature":0.1,"max_tokens":4096}'

default_local_ollama_lan.description: Default data-layer setup. Keeps document analysis on the LAN and mirrors the product-layer Ollama integration.

alternative_existing_deepseek.description: Alternative enterprise setup for an environment that already has approved DeepSeek access. This is intentionally not the default.

enterprise_cloud_fallback.description: Optional enterprise fallback chain. Use only after central IT approves external provider data movement for the relevant dataset classification.

governance.lakehouse_policy: LLM provider configuration is environment-specific. Curated data products, lineage, classification, and access controls remain governed centrally across lakehouse modules.
governance.secret_policy: Do not store API keys in this JSON file. Store secrets in environment variables, .env files, Docker secrets, or CI secret stores.
governance.review_policy: LLM output is advisory. Human review is required before confirming extracted product data, metadata, or certification meaning.
